analysis —
law emission is the greenhouse-gas DEBIT of [[sustainability]] — every gas reduced to one CO₂e figure by its IPCC GWP, summed, and matched by a credit ([[conservation]]) for the carbon books to close; an unknown gas contributes 0, never silently inflated.
